options.label: A
options.text: A material that lets light pass through it so you can see objects clearly

options.label: B
options.text: A material that absorbs all light and appears black

options.label: C
options.text: A material that reflects all light back to its source

options.label: D
options.text: A material that only lets some colours of light through

explanation: Transparent materials like glass and clear plastic allow light to pass straight through them, so you can see clearly through them. This is different from opaque materials which block light completely.
